description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a classic design, featuring a long, vented single barrel and a wooden full stock. The receiver and barrel are finished in matte black, while the stock and fore-end are made of polished wood with a reddish-brown hue and visible grain. The barrel has a ribbed vent running along its top, likely for heat dissipation and improved aiming. The fore-end is ribbed for grip, indicating its function as a pump mechanism. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a single trigger. Overall, the shotgun has a robust and utilitarian appearance, suitable for both sporting and defensive use.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a matte black barrel, vented rib, and polished wooden stock and fore-end. The design is classic and functional, with a ribbed pump grip and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow, circular muzzle and the ribbed fore-end directly behind it.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the barrel, the vented rib, the wooden stock, and the ribbed pump fore-end.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the wooden stock and pump fore-end.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented rib along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
